title: Drinium AntiCheat
description: Drinium AntiCheat is a lightweight, high-performance Fabric server-side mod designed for SMP and private servers.
body:
# **🛡️ Drinium AntiCheat**
**Drinium AntiCheat** is a lightweight, high-performance server-side mod for Fabric. It is designed specifically for SMP owners who want to maintain server integrity by preventing unauthorized player privileges and the use of restricted admin items.

## **✨ Features**

**🚫 Anti-Illegal Items**
The mod continuously scans player inventories and any open containers (Chests, Shulker Boxes, Barrels, etc.). If a restricted item is found, it is instantly deleted.

- _Includes: Bedrock, Barrier, Command Blocks, Debug Stick, and more._

**👑 Anti-OP Protection**
Prevents any player from gaining Operator status. If a player is promoted to OP (via glitches or unauthorized commands), the mod will immediately revoke the status within ticks.

**🛠️ Anti-Gamemode**
Forces all players to stay in Survival Mode. Any attempt to switch to Creative or Spectator mode will be reverted instantly to keep the gameplay fair.

**⚙️ Dynamic Toggle**
Enable or disable features on the fly without needing to restart your server using simple commands.

**💻 Commands**
You can manage the mod using the following command (requires Permission Level 4):


```
- /anticheat toggle <feature>
```

- Available Features: gamemode, op, illegal
